calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Maria Beltran, Transferor, And Bifco, Llc, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Maria Beltran, Petitioner (in person appearance)
David Belcher, Esq. Faegre Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP, for Petitioner Maria Beltran,
David Belcher, Esq.,via Zoom Conference
Shannon Raintree, Court Certified Spanish Interperter for Petitioner for Defendant via Zoom Conference
No other appearances.

Court discuss with petitioner and counsel present structured settlement agreement. Court wants to insure that petitioner understand the terms of the settlement agreement. Petitioner confirm that she does understand the terms of the setltement agreement.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER IN RE: MARIA BELTRAN: Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Maria Beltran, Transferor, And Bifco, Llc, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq. ig is Granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
